vocab.meaning: xả cơn giận/giải tỏa căng thẳng
vocab.example: To avoid getting frustrated in a jam, I often sing along to loud music just to let off steam.

vocab.meaning: ngồi không/không có việc gì làm (thường do chờ đợi)
vocab.example: Instead of just twiddling my thumbs while the traffic is at a standstill, I prefer to listen to educational podcasts.

vocab.word: get the show on the road
vocab.meaning: bắt đầu hành trình/khởi hành (thường dùng khi mong muốn di chuyển tiếp)
vocab.example: After being stuck for thirty minutes, I’m always itching to finally get the show on the road again.
In a massive gridlock, it's easy to lose your bearings, so I usually check my GPS for an alternative route.

vocab.meaning: quan sát thế giới xung quanh trôi qua
vocab.example: If I'm a passenger during a delay, I quite enjoy just sitting back and watching the world go by through the window.
